remarks: This is an incredible 1 bedroom apt w/ seperate entrance in the rear. A 2nd flr apt Lge EIK w/ pantry lots of windows w/ natural light, Lg BR w/ 2 walk in closets, Liv rm, & full bath. Parking is on the st (one way street) No pets, Credit ck & ref - Must see worth it
